description: Treat report-only CSP as enforcing.
Ignore default-src as script fallback.
Compose multiple enforced CSPs by union instead of intersection.
Treat report-only frame-ancestors as enforcing.
Treat meta-delivered frame-ancestors as enforcing.
Assume static rendering can provide fresh per-request nonces.
Accept duplicate ACAO values as a singleton authorization.
Treat Access-Control-Allow-Credentials as case-insensitive.
Allow wildcard ACAO on credentialed requests.
Treat origin reflection with credentials as safe.
Ignore Vary: Origin obligations for dynamic CORS.
Honor HSTS delivered over insecure transport.
Accept invalid HSTS max-age values.
Do not clear HSTS state on max-age=0.
Treat host HSTS as covering subdomains by default.
Treat weak preload-shaped HSTS headers as preload-ready.
Ignore cross-origin resource opt-in under COEP require-corp.
Treat CORP same-site as same-origin for stricter embedding intent.
Treat COEP alone as cross-origin isolation.
Treat empty Permissions-Policy allowlist as allowing the feature.
Treat wildcard Permissions-Policy allowlist as not over-allowing.
Ignore ordered layer drops of enforced CSP.
Over-report CSP conflicts whenever any CSP header is present.
Over-report CORS drift whenever ACAO is present.
Over-report HSTS drift whenever an STS header is present.
Over-report embedding drift whenever COEP is present.
Over-report Permissions-Policy drift whenever the header is present.
Over-report layer-composition drift whenever layers exist.
